subject: [MUSIC] Make MUSIC to use cert manager
commit_message:
[MUSIC] Make MUSIC to use cert manager

Make music to use cert manager to generate
and load the certificates

Issue-ID: OOM-2673
Signed-off-by: Krishna Moorthy <krishna.moorthy6@wipro.com>
Change-Id: I3c655107bebb969f317bcbe87cfc6a55a1821533
(cherry picked from commit ad1a3eca9ea049cab7d99569be53c4a6c781be02)

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Cherry Picked from branch master.

The following files contain Git conflicts:
* kubernetes/common/music/requirements.yaml
* kubernetes/common/music/resources/config/music-sb.properties
* kubernetes/common/music/templates/deployment.yaml
* kubernetes/common/music/values.yaml

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

as said to krishna, I believe there's too much changes for a Maintenance release
During OOM weekly, we decided to do the following:
- first update the needed hardcoded certificates (AAI(s), CDS, Message Router, MUSIC, VID) 
- tag the Maintenance Release
- move them to automated retrieval by "copy pasting" as cherry pick would be too hard
- propose TSC to tag another Maintenance Release or keep it as is

Patch Set 3:

Sounds good, Sylvain.

You need any help on that or you will be able to do it?
Catherine gave a contact from AT&T in yesterday's TSC call, who could help us with manually updating the certificates in the repo.

Patch Set 3:

SO, I shall abandon this commit and related ones.
